tasks.label: CMake Full Build (Release)
args: mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release .. && cmake --build .
tasks.detail: Full CMake configuration and build (Release profile)

tasks.label: CMake Full Build (Debug)
args: mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug .. && cmake --build .
tasks.detail: Full CMake configuration and build (Debug profile)
